description: Grease buildup visible on hood interior surfaces indicating inadequate cleaning frequency
visual_signals: dark greasy coating on hood interior walls
thick grease layer on hood plenum
sticky residue visible inside canopy hood

description: Grease dripping or hanging from exhaust filters indicating saturation beyond serviceable condition
visual_signals: grease dripping from baffle filters
oil droplets forming on filter edges
grease pooling beneath exhaust filters

description: Grease filters missing or displaced from hood leaving exhaust ductwork unprotected
visual_signals: empty filter slot in hood
filter hanging loosely or at angle
bare ductwork visible where filter should be seated

description: Fire suppression nozzle caps clogged with grease preventing proper spray pattern deployment
visual_signals: grease-coated nozzle caps on suppression system
nozzle openings obscured by buildup
discolored or plugged Ansul nozzles

description: Fusible links in hood suppression system coated in grease potentially raising activation temperature
visual_signals: grease-encrusted fusible link
discolored fusible link with thick coating
fusible link not visibly clean and shiny

description: Raw meat stored above ready-to-eat food creating cross-contamination risk
visual_signals: raw poultry or meat on shelf above prepared food
blood or juices dripping onto lower shelf items
raw protein containers positioned above salads or cooked items

description: Food items stored on floor instead of minimum 6 inches off the ground
visual_signals: food cases or containers sitting directly on floor
produce boxes on ground level
ingredient bags resting on floor surface

description: Uncovered food containers in walk-in cooler or prep area exposing contents to contamination
visual_signals: open container without lid or wrap in cooler
unwrapped food pan on shelf
exposed food without protective covering

description: Expired date labels visible on stored food items indicating product past use-by date
visual_signals: date label showing past date on food container
expired prep date sticker
discolored or old date marking on stored item

description: Food thawing at room temperature instead of under refrigeration or cold running water
visual_signals: frozen meat sitting on counter at ambient temperature
food package thawing in standing water at room temp
frost-covered protein left out on prep table

description: Mold or biofilm growth visible inside ice machine bin or dispensing chute
visual_signals: pink or black slime inside ice bin
mold spots on ice machine interior walls
biofilm on ice chute or deflector

description: Refrigerator or walk-in cooler door gaskets damaged, torn, or not sealing properly
visual_signals: torn rubber gasket on cooler door
gasket pulling away from door frame
visible gap between closed door and gasket seal

description: Cracked or deeply scored cutting boards harboring bacteria in surface damage
visual_signals: deep knife scores across cutting board surface
visible cracks or splits in cutting board
discolored grooves on worn cutting board

description: Rodent droppings visible in food storage, prep, or cooking areas
visual_signals: small dark pellet-shaped droppings on shelves or floor
droppings along wall edges or behind equipment
gnaw marks with droppings near food packaging

description: Pest glue traps showing catches indicating active infestation in kitchen area
visual_signals: insects or rodents caught on glue board
multiple catches visible on single trap
glue traps with debris indicating pest activity

description: Overflowing waste bins or bins without lids attracting pests and creating sanitation hazard
visual_signals: trash piled above bin rim
waste bin with missing or open lid
garbage overflow onto floor around bin

description: Standing water or grease accumulation on kitchen floor creating slip hazard
visual_signals: water pooling on floor near drains
greasy sheen on floor tiles
standing liquid near cooking line or dish area

description: Damaged, cracked, or missing floor tiles creating trip hazard and harborage for bacteria
visual_signals: cracked or chipped floor tile
missing tile exposing subfloor
lifted tile edge creating uneven surface

description: Empty hand soap or sanitizer dispensers at handwash stations preventing proper hand hygiene
visual_signals: empty soap dispenser at handwash sink
no soap visible in dispenser unit
hand sanitizer station with empty container

description: Kitchen staff missing hair nets or gloves while handling food in prep areas
visual_signals: worker with uncovered hair handling food
bare hands touching ready-to-eat items
missing hair restraint in food prep zone

description: Fire extinguisher missing from designated mounting location near cooking line
visual_signals: empty fire extinguisher bracket on wall
missing extinguisher from designated station
extinguisher mounting hook with no unit present

description: Fire extinguisher with expired inspection tag indicating overdue service
visual_signals: inspection tag with past-due date
no current annual inspection tag on extinguisher
expired service label on extinguisher body

description: Gaps in walls or baseboards near floor level providing pest entry points
visual_signals: visible gap between baseboard and wall
hole or crack in wall near floor
daylight visible through wall penetration

description: Walk-in cooler or freezer emergency interior release mechanism missing, obstructed, non-functional, or lacking glow-in-the-dark marking per code
visual_signals: walk-in cooler interior door handle missing or broken off
emergency release mechanism inside freezer blocked by stored product
interior safety release on walk-in door without glow-in-dark indicator or signage

description: Hot held food items displayed or stored below the required 135 degrees F minimum holding temperature, entering the temperature danger zone
visual_signals: steam table pan with food showing no visible steam and no thermometer confirming temperature
buffet heat lamp over food with thermometer reading below 135F
hot holding unit with temperature display showing value below safe minimum

description: Cold held food items stored or displayed above the required 41 degrees F maximum holding temperature
visual_signals: salad bar with thermometer showing reading above 41F
cold prep table with food and temperature display above safe range
refrigerated display case thermometer reading above 41F

description: Refrigeration unit or cold holding equipment lacking a visible and functional thermometer for temperature verification
visual_signals: walk-in cooler interior with no thermometer visible on wall or shelf
prep cooler without thermometer on display or hanging inside unit
cold holding unit with broken or missing temperature gauge

description: Handwashing station lacking required signage instructing employees to wash hands, or signage not posted in the employee's language
visual_signals: handwash sink area with bare wall and no hand washing sign posted
faded or illegible handwashing sign above sink
handwash station with sign posted only in English in multilingual kitchen

description: Three-compartment sink not set up correctly with wash, rinse, and sanitize sequence or missing required temperature and concentration labels
visual_signals: three-compartment sink without labels identifying wash rinse and sanitize compartments
sanitize compartment of three-bay sink with no test strip dispenser visible
three-compartment sink with single water temperature visible below required minimum

description: Grease trap showing signs of overflow, backup, or inaccessible location preventing required maintenance service
visual_signals: grease trap lid with grease overflow residue on surrounding floor
foul-smelling standing liquid pooling around grease interceptor access point
grease trap access cover blocked by equipment or storage preventing service

description: Knives stored improperly with exposed blades creating laceration risk for employees reaching into storage or near traffic paths
visual_signals: loose knives with exposed blades in a drawer mixed with other utensils
knife with blade extending over edge of magnetic strip near walkway
knives placed blade-up in dish rack or drying area

description: Cleaning chemicals and sanitizers stored in proximity to or above food, food contact surfaces, or single-use items without required separation
visual_signals: spray bottles of cleaner stored on shelf directly above food containers
chemical jugs on same shelf as dry food ingredients
unlabeled spray bottle sitting on food prep surface

description: Chemical spray bottles or secondary containers lacking required content identification labels per OSHA Hazard Communication standard
visual_signals: plain unmarked spray bottle containing colored liquid on shelf
secondary chemical container without any label or marking
squeeze bottle with chemical liquid but no name or hazard identification

description: Excessive condensation on walls, ceiling, or cold surfaces indicating inadequate ventilation or makeup air imbalance in kitchen
visual_signals: water droplets forming on ceiling directly above cooking or prep area
condensation running down wall surfaces near hood system
moisture fog or haze visible in kitchen atmosphere near exhaust hood

description: Employee personal items including purses, phones, backpacks, or personal food stored in food preparation or cooking areas
visual_signals: cell phone sitting on food prep counter surface
employee backpack or purse stored on shelf near food items
personal food container or beverage cup on prep table or cooking line

description: Pest control bait station damaged, improperly placed near food areas, or electronic fly killing device positioned over food prep surfaces
visual_signals: bait station with cracked or open housing near food storage
electronic insect light trap mounted directly above food preparation counter
pest bait station placed inside walk-in cooler or near open food containers

description: Dish machine sanitizer concentration below required minimum or rinse temperature below required threshold for proper sanitization
visual_signals: dish machine temperature gauge displaying rinse temperature below 180F for hot water sanitizing
chemical sanitizer test strip showing concentration below minimum ppm requirement
dish machine chemical dispenser showing empty sanitizer container with low indicator light

description: Hood suppression system service tag expired or pull station for kitchen fire suppression obstructed or inaccessible
visual_signals: hood suppression system tag showing expired semi-annual inspection date
kitchen fire suppression pull station blocked by equipment or shelving
missing or illegible service tag on Ansul or hood suppression system cylinder

description: Food not properly labeled with item name and preparation date for date marking per FDA Food Code seven-day rule for ready-to-eat TCS foods
visual_signals: food container in cooler without any date label or content identification
prepped food pan missing both item name and preparation date sticker
multiple unlabeled containers of similar-looking product on walk-in shelf

description: Cooking equipment with heavy carbon buildup or grease accumulation on exterior surfaces creating fire ignition risk
visual_signals: thick black carbon crust on fryer exterior and backsplash
heavy grease buildup on grill exterior panels and legs
charred food debris and grease layered on oven exterior surfaces
